welcome.body:
A quiet reminder. Nothing to track,
nothing to win — only to notice.
welcome.headline: A life in dots.
welcome.tagline:
Each dot,
a week of your life.

settings.epigraph:
One ought, every day at least,
to look upon a few dots.
settings.title: Settings
